name: Baidu, Inc.
description: Baidu, Inc. is a leading AI company with strong Internet foundation. Founded in 2000, Baidu has grown to become one of the largest search engine and internet service providers globally. The company offers a comprehensive suite of search, community, and information services, alongside advanced artificial intelligence technologies, cloud services, and autonomous driving solutions through Apollo. Baidu is dedicated to making the complicated world simpler through technology.
